NEXT:         Open a FRESH Claude Code session and say "Start Sub-batch 5.3b" (or "Continue Batch 5 Item 3"). 🎯 Item 3 progress: 1 of ~4 sub-batches shipped (5.3a). Next concrete task is **Sub-batch 5.3b — BullMQ pdf-render queue + processor + worker + wire reportExport.create → enqueue**. Brief shape (mirrors 5.1c area-rederive + 5.2b patrol-track-materialize patterns): (a) New `packages/jobs/src/queues/pdf-render.queue.ts` — `pdfRenderQueue` Queue + `PdfRenderJobData {tenantId, userId, exportId}` + `enqueuePdfRender(payload): Promise<string>` helper; jobId pattern `pdf-render:${exportId}` (NOT scoped by tenant — exportId is globally unique per the reportExport.id PK) for BullMQ-layer dedupe at enqueue time so re-enqueue of an in-flight render collapses to one job. (b) New `packages/jobs/src/processors/pdf-render.processor.ts` — loads ReportExport row by id via `platformPrisma as unknown as ExtendedPrismaClient` cast (same pattern as 5.1c area-rederive.processor + 5.2b patrol-track-materialize.processor per [[2026-05-20 🟡 platformPrisma → ExtendedPrismaClient cast pattern]]); updates status `queued → rendering` atomically; constructs printUrl from row's `reportType` + tenant slug + exportId following the `/print-render/[tenantSlug]/[reportType]/[exportId]` template locked in DECISIONS_LOG; calls renderPdfViaService (from @marine-guardian/web/server/lib? OR re-export the client into @marine-guardian/jobs for cross-package consumption — verify the import surface and possibly relocate the client to packages/jobs/src/lib/ via git mv following the 5.1c + 5.2a relocation arc); on success: uploads PDF buffer to storage (STUB the storage call in 5.3b — pass {tenantSlug, year, month, exportId} path-only and let the storage write be a no-op `return {key: <path>}` mock; real MinIO surface lands in 5.3c); updates row `status=ready, filePath, completedAt`; fires in-app notification via existing email/notification queue per v2 L778; on failure: 3× BullMQ retry with backoff then update row status=failed + errorJson. Returns RenderResult `{exportId, status, pointCount?, filePath?, errorMessage?}`. (c) New `packages/jobs/src/workers/pdf-render.worker.ts` — factory `startPdfRenderWorker()` using base-worker.createWorker with concurrency PDF_RENDER_CONCURRENCY=2 + limiter `{max:5, duration:1000}` per DECISIONS_LOG "Puppeteer Concurrency + Rate Limiter" lock. (d) Modify barrels: queues/types.ts (+PdfRenderJobPayload + QUEUE_NAMES.PDF_RENDER='pdf-render' + JobPayloadMap entry), queues/index.ts, processors/index.ts, workers/index.ts (+startPdfRenderWorker), start-workers.ts (+register as 7th worker), packages/jobs/src/index.ts (+re-exports). (e) Modify apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/reportExport.ts — wire `createReportExport` mutation to call `enqueuePdfRender({exportId: created.id, tenantId, userId: ctx.userId})` AFTER the prisma.reportExport.create insert (loop unclosed today per 4.1c scaffold — see CHANGELOG_AI 2026-05-19 entry: "currently inserts queued row, no enqueue"). Add AuditLog `EXPORT_REQUESTED` write inside same transaction. Test coverage target: queue 5-6 cases + processor 8-10 cases (status transitions, retry path, notification fire, error capture, mock renderer client, mock storage upload) + worker 4-5 cases + reportExport.create wiring 3-4 cases = ~22-26 net new tests bringing jobs to ~115-120 total. Estimated ~35K main-session tokens including orientation + verification + governance. Dispatch path: main-session Opus 4.7 (consistent with 5.3a). After 5.3b ships → 5.3c (packages/storage MinIO surface + /api/exports/reports/[id]/download Route Handler + replace storage stub in 5.3b processor with real upload) → 5.3d (admin UI list page + polling + retry mutation + button) → 🎯 Phase 8 Batch 5 Item 3 COMPLETE → Batch 5 COMPLETE → Batch 6+ (breaking migrations + user-visible features per POST-ITEM-1 DEFERRED ledger below).
